channel.title: OpticCss' erapass
channel.description: Mapping personal academic research, insights, life, and my signals onto the time-frequency plane. Dedicated to fellow signal processing enthusiasts.

item.title: 开头 | erapass 建站手册
item.description: 今晚站点的编译环境崩了 | 一周努力白费 | 重开的同时留个念想 | 方便以后从头再来.
item.content:encoded:
import { Collapse, Aside, Spoiler, Icon, Button, Svg, Steps, Tabs, TabItem } from 'astro-pure/user' import { Icons as allIcons } from 'astro-pure/libs'

import { Quote, GithubCard, LinkPreview } from 'astro-pure/advanced'

当前个人网站经过了多次迭代, 是典型的静态网页, 依靠本地编译生成, 并基于 GitHub Pages 进行部署. 这类网站完全免费且不需要任何数据库支持, 但具有如下几个缺点,

  • 占用空间限制: space should not be greater than 1 G.
  • 流量限制: monthly flow should not be greater than 100 G.
  • 更新次数限制: cannot be updated 10 times per hour.
  • 自定义功能限制: cannot be equipped with comment function (this can be complemented by third-party services).

尽管如此, 静态网页带来了更多好处, 成为个人网站项目的首选.

注意, 静态网页只由 plain HTML 文件构成, 不同于由 PHP 生成的动态网页, 静态网页对于每个用户都展示相同的界面. 这也帮助没有数据库编程经验的人仅依靠 HTML/CSS 知识完成建站.

此类网站一般加载得更快, 因为服务器不需要解析任何内容, 只是读取 plain HTML 文件. 其与动态网页的优劣区别需结合实际应用权衡.

网站选取 Astro 高效能网络框架作为静态站点生成器 (static site generator, SSG), 它是首个普及群岛架构 (islands architecture) 的框架, 大幅减少了用户端负担从而提升网页的初始加载性能, 开发者可在 Astro 中对同一专案同时使用如 React 和 Vue 等多种 UI 框架.

个人网页平台利用 markdown 以及 Markdown for the component era (MDX) 编写的文章生成对应网页, 并支持通过 Vite 使用如 Sass 等 CSS 预处理器, 将脚本解析成 CSS. Astro 可以看作一类内容管理系统 (content management system, CMS, 可作 client 使用), 能够加载自定义 layout 文件以及对应 .md 与 .mdx 文件到每一网页中, 从而节约重写次数.

具体地, 本项目基于 Astro 构建, 支持 Markdown, MDX, 组件化开发, 并集成搜索, 标签, 评论等功能, 以下为项目文件结构.

  • src/ 源代码主目录. 用户的主要工作区, 包含页面, 组件, 内容和样式.

    • src/pages/ 页面路由. 每个 .astro、.md、.mdx 文件会自动生成对应的路由 (如 pages/about/index.astro $\to$ /about).
    • src/content/ 内容集合. 包含博客 (blog/, 每篇文章可包含标题, 日期, 标签等 Frontmatter), 其它文档等.
    • src/components/ 可复用 UI 组件. 按功能模块划分为 about/, home/, links/, projects/, waline/ 评论组件 (文件类型 .astro/.jsx/.tsx).
    • src/layouts/ 页面布局. 定义全局页面结构 (头部, 底部, 侧边栏).
    • src/assets/ 静态资源. 图片, 字体, 图标, 样式文件等.

  • public/ 公共静态资源. 直接映射到网站根目录的 /favicon/, /images/, /scripts/ 等资源.

  • dist/ 构建输出目录. 为运行 npm run build 后生成的用于部署的静态文件 (包含所有页面, 资源, 搜索索引等).

  • packages/pure/ 本地核心模块, 与主项目解耦.

  • node_modules/astro-pure 主项目核心模块.

  • astro.config.ts Astro 根目录配置文件. 用于配置站点 URL, 构建选项, 集成, Vite 设置等.

① 云端分支部署

手动将项目编译得到的静态网页 dist 上传到 GitHub 中, 进入仓库 Settings-GitHub Pages-Build and deployment-Branch , 选择 jinzhao_release 作为当前站点的 source.

首先运行编译命令, 同时本地预览.

npm run build
npx astro preview

实时更改的本地预览命令为.

npm run dev

同样于链接 http://localhost:4321/Era_Pass/ 检测生成网页. 检查后变更网络至代理 (如 Clash 常用端口 7890), 并将生成静态网页推送至 Github 云端分支 jinzhao_release (生成 dist 静态网站目录剥离为本地临时分支 deploy-branch, 再覆盖到云端分支).

git config --global http.proxy http://127.0.0.1:7890
git config --global https.proxy http://127.0.0.1:7890
git add dist -f
git commit -m "Deploy: static site content update"
git subtree split --prefix dist -b deploy-branch
git push origin deploy-branch:jinzhao_release --force

网页正确运行则将在仓库 Action 页面出现蓝色 check mark, 否则显示红色 error mark, 成功托管的静态网页可在如下网址 erapass 访问.

② 网站基本设置

字体 | Satoshi 本地加载

在全局设置加入本地字体 (不刻意设置 weights, 不采用 fontProviders.fontshare() 以避免依靠网络加载).

fonts: [
	{
    provider: fontProviders.local(),
    name: 'Satoshi',
    cssVariable: '--font-satoshi',
    options: {
		variants: [{
			src: ['./src/assets/fonts/Satoshi-Variable.ttf'],
			style: 'normal'
		}]}
	}
],

题头 | Bezier 旋转

在全局样式表设置加入个人头像的主题旋转, 以适配当前小狗灵的时频世界主题标头. 创建样式表.

img[alt=Avatar] {
	-webkit-transition: -webkit-transform 1s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0.05, 0.36, 1);
	-moz-transition: -moz-transform 1s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0.05, 0.36, 1);
	-o-transition: -o-transform 1s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0.05, 0.36, 1);
	-ms-transition: -ms-transform 1s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0.05, 0.36, 1);
	transition: transform 1s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0.05, 0.36, 1);
}
img[alt=Avatar]:hover {
	-webkit-transform: rotateZ(-360deg);
	-moz-transform: rotateZ(-360deg);
	-o-transform: rotateZ(-360deg);
	-ms-transform: rotateZ(-360deg);
	transform: rotateZ(-360deg);
}

导航 | BlurFilter 毛玻璃

在全局样式表设置加入网页标头的低通模糊. 创建样式表 (.not-top 筛选顶部元素非置顶情形, 即滚动页面后, dark 筛选白 / 黑色界面切换).

header-component[class*="astro-"].not-top {
	--un-border-opacity: 1 !important;
	background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75) !important;
	-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(2px) !important;
	backdrop-filter: blur(2px) !important;
}
html[class*="dark"] header-component[class*="astro-"].not-top {
	background: rgba(28, 28, 29, 0.8) !important;
	-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(2px) !important;
	backdrop-filter: blur(2px) !important;
}

文摘 | Quote 随机格言

在文段加入 HTML 标签.

<Quote />

③ 网页部件设计

简历 | PDFjs 阅读容器

在网页中置入嵌入式 PDF 阅读器, 承装个人简历的 .pdf 文件. 包含如下功能.

采用 <iframe> 配合 PDF.js 网页部件实现 PDF 阅读容器, 首先安装 pdfjs-viewer.

npm install pdfjs-viewer-element

而后创建样式表.

<script>
    import 'pdfjs-viewer-element';
</script>
<style>
    .pdf-container {
		width: 100%;
		max-width: 850px;
		height: 50vh;
		min-height: 400px;
		margin: 20px auto;
		border-radius: 10px;
		overflow: hidden;
	}
	pdfjs-viewer-element {
		display: block;
		width: 100%;
		height: 100%;
	}
</style>

并加入 pdf 阅读-编辑器模块.

<div class="pdf-container">
<pdfjs-viewer-element
	src="/Era_Pass/resume/Jinzhao_Li_CV_Sp_.pdf",
	viewer-css-theme="AUTOMATIC",
    zoom="page-width",>
</pdfjs-viewer-element>
</div>

经历 | Card 背景框格

含背景的个人经历, 其包含如下功能.

利用 Astro 的 ImageMetadata 加载功能, 加上 HTMLTag 及多态 Polymorphic 特性实现 Card 背景窗格. 首先为 Card 设置类型并加载网页 \asset 中的图像 (Tag='a' 将 Card 设置为可点击链接).

type Props<Tag extends HTMLTag> = Polymorphic<{ as: Tag }> & {
    heading?: string
    subheading?: string
    imagePath?: string
    altText?: string
    href?: string
    date?: string
    class?: string
}
const { as: Tag = 'a', class: className, href, heading, subheading, date, imagePath, altText } = Astro.props
const images = import.meta.glob<{ default: ImageMetadata }>(
  	['/src/assets/users/*.{jpeg,jpg,png,gif,avif,webp}',
  	'/src/assets/experiences/*.{jpeg,jpg,png,gif,avif,webp}',]
)
if (!images[imagePath])
  	throw new Error(
  	`"${imagePath}" does not exist in glob: "src/assets/*.{jpeg,jpg,png,gif,avif,webp}"`
  )

而后创建样式表 (--un-gradient-from-position 和 --un-gradient-to-position 调整图像的渐变透出度最小和最大值).

<style>
	.card-fg {
		--un-gradient-shape: to bottom in oklch;
		--un-gradient: var(--un-gradient-shape), var(--un-gradient-stops);
		--un-gradient-from-position: 20%;
		--un-gradient-from: transparent var(--un-gradient-from-position);
		--un-gradient-to-position: 80%;
		--un-gradient-to: hsl(var(--card) / var(--un-to-opacity, 1)) var(--un-gradient-to-position);
		--un-gradient-stops: var(--un-gradient-from), var(--un-gradient-to);
		background-image: linear-gradient(var(--un-gradient));
	}
	.card:hover .card-fg {
		--un-gradient-to-position: 100%;
	}
</style>

并加入带背景及链接的窗格模块 (rounded-md 较小圆角, -lg 中圆角, -xl 大圆角, -2xl 二倍大圆角, font-size 和 weight, margin-top 等调整 subhead 内容以及段落间距).

<Tag class={cn(
    className, 'card group overflow-hidden relative flex flex-col justify-end rounded-md border bg-muted',
    href && 'transition-all hover:border-foreground/25 hover:shadow-sm'
    )} href={href} target='_blank'>
    <Image
		src={images[imagePath]()}
		alt={altText ?? heading}
		class='absolute w-full object-contain opacity-60 transition-opacity group-hover:opacity-100 dark:opacity-40'
		class='absolute w-full h-full object-cover opacity-60 transition-opacity group-hover:opacity-100 dark:opacity-40'
		loading='lazy'
	/>
	<div class='card-fg z-10 flex flex-col gap-y-0.5 px-5 pb-4 pt-10 transition-all'>
		<h2 class='text-lg font-medium' style='line-height:1.2em;'>{heading}</h2>
		<p class='text-muted-foreground' style='font-size: 0.8em; font-weight: 700; line-height:1.2em; margin-bottom: 0.1em; margin-top: -1.2em;'>{subheading}</p>
		<p class='text-muted-foreground' style='font-size: 0.75em; font-weight: 400; line-height:1.2em; margin-bottom: -0.2em; margin-top: 0.1em;'>{date}</p>
	</div>
	<slot />
</Tag>

类似地, 窗格模块也适用于科研项目简介的 ProjectCard 类型.

<Tag class={cn(
	className, 'project-card group overflow-hidden relative flex flex-col justify-end rounded-2xl border bg-muted ',
	href && 'transition-all hover:border-foreground/25 hover:shadow-sm'
	)} href={href} target='_blank'>
	<Image
		src={images[imagePath]()}
		alt={altText ?? heading}
		class='absolute w-full object-contain opacity-60 transition-opacity group-hover:opacity-100 dark:opacity-40'
		class='absolute w-full h-full object-cover opacity-60 transition-opacity group-hover:opacity-100 dark:opacity-40'
		loading='lazy'
	/>
	<div class='project-card-fg z-10 flex flex-col gap-y-0.5 px-5 pb-4 pt-10 transition-all'>
        <h2 class='text-lg font-medium' style='line-height:1.2em;'>{ heading}</h2>
        <p class='text-muted-foreground' style='font-size: 0.8em; line-height:1.2em; margin-top: 0.2em;'>{subheading}</p>
    </div>
	<slot />
</Tag>

④ 文章部件设计

隐藏 | Spoiler 块

以 HTML 标签形式加入覆盖块.

<Spoiler>隐藏文字</Spoiler>

代码 | Collapsed 块

首先基于 Shiki 渲染器配置进一步增添代码触发折叠的逻辑.

export const addCollapse = (): ShikiTransformer => {
  const line = 5
  return {
    name: 'shiki-transformer-add-collapse',

而后创建样式表 (max-height 只包含对应行数).

&.collapsed {
	& pre {
		max-height: 5rem;
		overflow: hidden;
    }

在全局设置中调用上面代码折叠块的函数.

export default defineConfig({
    shikiConfig: {
        ...
		transformers: [
			addCollapse()
		]
    }
) as any

强调 | Aside 块

加入文章的注意, 危险等强调色块 (type 若不指定则对应采用 note 类型).

<Aside>...</Aside>
<Aside type='danger'>contents to be noted</Aside>

媒体 | Icon 常量

介绍 email, scholar, GitHub 等社交媒体账号的对应图标.

设置全局常量 Icon (viewBox 前两数字控制图标平移位置, transform="scale()" 控制图标缩放大小). 应同时在 \packages\pure\libs\icons.ts 以及 \node_modules\astro-pure\components\user\Icon.astro 两路径中完成更改.

export const BuiltInIcons = {
	google_scholar:
    	'<svg viewBox="12 16 32 32" width="100%" height="100%"><g transform="scale(0.07)" transform-origin="center"><path fill="currentColor" d="M343.759 106.662V79.43L363.524 64h-213.89L20.476 176.274h85.656a82 82 0 0 0-.219 6.225c0 20.845 7.22 38.087 21.672 51.861c14.453 13.797 32.252 20.648 53.327 20.648c4.923 0 9.75-.368 14.438-1.024c-2.907 6.5-4.374 12.523-4.374 18.142c0 9.875 4.499 20.43 13.467 31.642c-39.234 2.67-68.061 9.732-86.437 21.163c-10.531 6.5-19 14.704-25.39 24.531c-6.391 9.9-9.578 20.515-9.578 31.962c0 9.648 2.062 18.336 6.219 26.062c4.156 7.726 9.578 14.07 16.312 18.984c6.718 4.968 14.469 9.101 23.219 12.469c8.734 3.344 17.406 5.718 26.061 7.062A167 167 0 0 0 180.555 448c13.469 0 26.953-1.734 40.547-5.187c13.562-3.485 26.28-8.642 38.171-15.493c11.86-6.805 21.515-16.086 28.922-27.718c7.39-11.68 11.094-24.805 11.094-39.336c0-11.016-2.25-21.039-6.75-30.14c-4.468-9.073-9.938-16.542-16.452-22.345c-6.501-5.813-13-11.155-19.516-15.968c-6.5-4.845-12-9.75-16.468-14.813c-4.485-5.046-6.735-10.054-6.735-14.984c0-4.921 1.734-9.672 5.216-14.265c3.455-4.61 7.674-9.048 12.61-13.306c4.937-4.25 9.875-8.968 14.796-14.133c4.922-5.147 9.141-11.827 12.61-20.008c3.485-8.18 5.203-17.445 5.203-27.757c0-13.453-2.547-24.46-7.547-33.314c-.594-1.022-1.218-1.803-1.875-3.022l56.907-46.672v17.119c-7.393.93-6.624 5.345-6.624 10.635V245.96c0 5.958 4.875 10.834 10.834 10.834h3.989c5.958 0 10.833-4.875 10.833-10.834V117.293c0-5.277.778-9.688-6.561-10.63m-107.36 222.48c1.14.75 3.704 2.78 7.718 6.038c4.05 3.243 6.797 5.695 8.266 7.414a444 444 0 0 1 6.376 7.547c2.813 3.375 4.718 6.304 5.718 8.734q1.5 3.717 3.047 8.946a38.3 38.3 0 0 1 1.485 10.562c0 17.048-6.564 29.68-19.656 37.859c-13.125 8.18-28.767 12.274-46.938 12.274c-9.187 0-18.203-1.093-27.063-3.196c-8.843-2.116-17.311-5.336-25.39-9.601c-8.078-4.258-14.577-10.204-19.5-17.797c-4.938-7.64-7.407-16.415-7.407-26.25c0-10.32 2.797-19.29 8.422-26.906c5.594-7.625 12.938-13.391 22.032-17.315c9.063-3.946 18.25-6.742 27.562-8.398a158 158 0 0 1 28.438-2.555c4.47 0 7.936.25 10.405.696c.455.219 3.032 2.07 7.735 5.563c4.704 3.462 7.625 5.595 8.75 6.384zm-3.359-100.579c-7.406 8.86-17.734 13.288-30.953 13.288c-11.86 0-22.298-4.764-31.266-14.312c-9-9.523-15.422-20.328-19.344-32.43c-3.937-12.109-5.906-23.984-5.906-35.648q.002-20.54 10.781-34.976c7.187-9.65 17.5-14.485 30.938-14.485c11.875 0 22.374 5.038 31.437 15.157c9.094 10.085 15.61 21.413 19.517 33.968c3.922 12.54 5.873 24.53 5.873 35.984c0 13.446-3.702 24.61-11.076 33.454z" /></g></svg>',
	gmail:
    	'<svg viewBox="20 20 32 32"><g transform="scale(0.04)" transform-origin="center"><path fill="currentColor" d="M696.022905 317.226952h-37.625501v48.180187h37.625501c76.228288 0 138.285932 62.057645 138.285933 138.285932v226.143921c0 17.297958-14.072915 31.468601-31.468601 31.468601H513.3682c0.6841-3.518229 0.977286-7.036457 0.977286-10.652415V503.7908c0-54.82573-23.943501-104.080931-61.764459-138.285933h124.310746v222.332507c0 0.586371-0.195457 1.172743-0.195457 1.759114 0 25.507158 20.718458 46.225616 46.225616 46.225615s46.225616-20.718458 46.225615-46.225615-19.545715-44.759687-43.977858-45.93243v-323.48158c0-4.202329 3.4205-7.5251 7.5251-7.525101h70.266845v-48.180187h-70.266845c-30.784501 0-55.803016 25.018515-55.803016 55.803016v97.142203H327.879366c-102.81046 0-186.466119 83.655659-186.466119 186.466119v246.862379c0 32.445887 26.386715 58.832602 58.832601 58.832601h602.398932c43.88013 0 79.648788-35.67093 79.648787-79.648788V503.7908c0-102.81046-83.655659-186.466119-186.466119-186.46612zM200.441306 761.207864c-5.863714 0-10.652415-4.7887-10.652415-10.652414V503.693071c0-76.228288 62.057645-138.285932 138.285932-138.285932s138.285932 62.057645 138.285933 138.285932V750.55545c0 5.863714-4.7887 10.652415-10.652415 10.652414H200.539034z" p-id="3369" fill="#000000"></path><path d="M245.591907 487.470128h139.067761v48.180187H245.591907z" p-id="3370" fill="#000000"></path></g></svg>',
}
export const Icons = {
 	...BuiltInIcons
}
export type IconsType = keyof typeof Icons

并在页脚加入对应的图标模块.

footer: {
    social: [
      { icon: 'email', label: 'Email', href: 'mailto:opticscss@gmail.com' },
      { icon: 'google_scholar', label: 'Google Scholar', href: 'https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=6sFE0UQAAAAJ' },
      { icon: 'github', label: 'GitHub', href: 'https://github.com/Opticcss' },
      { icon: 'rss', label: 'RSS', href: '/Era_Pass/rss.xml' }
    ]
  },

图标可由如下两类形式引入.

<Svg src={import('@/assets/icons/key.svg?raw')} />
<Icon name='rss' class='inline' />

如下为当前网页支持图标常量.

目录 | TOC 列表

加入列表头名及加粗.

<toc-heading class={className} {...props}>
	<h2 class='font-medium' style='font-size: 1.05em; font-weight: 700;'>Contents</h2>
	<ul class='mt-4' style='font-size: 0.95em;'>
		{toc.map((heading) => <TOCHeading heading={heading} />)}
	</ul>
</toc-heading>

预览 | PostPreview 表

加入最大预览文章篇数.

const MAX_POSTS = 5
const allPosts = await getBlogCollection()
const allPostsByDate = sortMDByDate(allPosts).slice(0, MAX_POSTS)

{allPostsByDate.length > 0 && (
	<Section title='Recent Art'>
		<ul class='flex flex-col gap-y-1.5 sm:gap-y-2'>
			{allPostsByDate.map((p) => (
				<li class='flex flex-col gap-x-2 sm:flex-row'>
					<PostPreview post={p} />
				</li>
			))}
		</ul>
		<Button title='More Articles' class='w-fit self-end' href='/Era_Pass/blog' variant='ahead' />
	</Section>
)}

编号 | Steps 表

加入文章有序列表的分点项目.

<Steps>
1. content in the first row.
    subcontent follows the first row.
2. content in the second row.
</Steps>

选栏 | TabItem 表

加入文章可选列表的选项卡内容.

<Tabs> 
<TabItem label="Stars">Sirius, Vega, Betelgeuse</TabItem>
<TabItem label="Moons">Io, Europa, Ganymede</TabItem>
</Tabs>

标签 | Tag 按钮

加入文章 Frontmatter 的日期, 阅读时间以及标签内容.

<div class='flex items-center gap-1'>
	<Icon name='calendar' class='size-5' />
	<FormattedDate class='font-sans' date={publishDate} dateTimeOptions={dateTimeOptions} />
		...
		{!!tags?.length && (
		<span class='flex items-center gap-1'>
			<Icon name='hashtag' class='size-5' />
				{tags.map((tag: string, i: number) => (
					<div>
						<a  aria-label={`View more blogs with the tag ${tag}`}
							class='hover:underline hover:underline-offset-4'
							data-pagefind-filter='tag'
							href={`/Era_Pass/tags/${tag}`}
                		   >{tag}
						</a>
                		{i < tags.length - 1 && '/'}
					</div>
                	))}
				</span>
		)}
</div>
